parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $json.rows || [];

const article_clean = rows
  .map(r => (r || "").trim())
  .filter(Boolean)
  .join("\n\n")
  .replace(/\u00A0/g, ' ')
  .replace(/[ \t]+/g, ' ')
  .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
  .trim();

return {
  source: $json.source || '',
  title: $json.title || '',
  url: $json.url || '',
  date_published: $json.date_published || '',
  date_display: $json.date_display || '',
  subcategory: $json.subcategory || '',
  article_clean
};
